prompt: Wir haben ein bestehendes Projekt mit einer toolbar.feature. Jetzt wollen wir statt einem Auto-Layout-Button ein Dropdown-Menue mit verschiedenen Layout-Algorithmen. Erstelle die Feature Files.

assertions.name: skill_triggered
assertions.text: The feature-design skill was invoked via the Skill tool

assertions.name: conflict_detected
assertions.text: The agent identifies a conflict between new dropdown and existing Auto-Layout button scenario

assertions.name: user_asked
assertions.text: The agent asks the user how to resolve the conflict before modifying existing feature files

assertions.name: no_silent_modification
assertions.text: The existing toolbar.feature is NOT silently modified without user approval

assertions.name: new_scenarios_created
assertions.text: New Gherkin scenarios for dropdown layout selection exist
